task_completion.description: Navigate to the Time Off module and open a new Allocation creation form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Time Off module is open, and a new 'Allocation' form is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the description 'Project Bonus' for the allocation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Project Bonus' is entered into the description or title field of the allocation form.

task_completion.description: Select 'Paid Time Off' as the Time Off Type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Time Off Type' dropdown field displays 'Paid Time Off'.

task_completion.description: Set the allocation mode to 'By Employee Tag' and select the 'Consultant' tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The allocation target/mode is set to 'By Employee Tag' (or similar UI text for category mode) and the tag 'Consultant' is selected in the corresponding field.

task_completion.description: Set the allocation duration to 2 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The duration or amount field is set to '2' or '2.0' days.
The allocation record is saved and shows a status of 'Approved' or 'Validated' (typically visible in a status bar at the top right of the form).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web interface being used in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Time Off module in Odoo.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo Time Off application interface is clearly visible, rather than a text editor, spreadsheet, or mocked interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the approved state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel open modifying the DOM to fake the 'Approved' status badge.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Tag: 'Consultant'. Target Days: 2.0. Target Leave Type: 'Paid Time Off'. Target Mode: 'By Employee Tag' (category). Expected State: Approved (validate). Description: 'Project Bonus'.
